title: PokeUniversal
description: Catch, trade and battle Pokemon around the world with trusty Pokeball! Play the newest Pokemon mod in that is becoming very famous.
body:
![Gotta catch them all!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fcd50187d549c257dcb6bb6f322b58a54df40570.png)
![Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d95ddcebf72012276bb968da93621604fc10931.png)
![Description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b76da7b28039c9f8b26ea19f5c83d8c798ba6e23.png)
Experience two fantastic franchises such as Pokemon and Minecraft in one exciting adventure. Catch, train, evolve Pokemon and more with Cobblemon's new adventure. With insane updates from the developers themselves, you'll get a taste of what their world of creation is about to offer.

 

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 

So, what are you waiting for? Run to the dream of becoming a Pokemon Master and catch every Pokemon on the way!
[Click here to get 25% off your first month on your Minecraft server purchase!](https://bisecthosting.com/SHADOW)
![get 25% off your first month on your Minecraft server purchase!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aa244001a9c729ccd107ecda9a077c1ec6395ee9.png)
